title: Puerto Rico presence test — 549 days over 3 years prong
notes: Counts PR days in the current tax year plus the two preceding years (each weighted 1x). Simplification: the real rule requires at least 60 days of presence in EACH of the three years; this model enforces the 60-day minimum only for the current year, so verify the prior-year minimums in the per-year output of act60-pr-183.
